app.name: Usta
app.tagline: A master mechanic in your pocket

account.title: Account
account.upgradeDesc: Unlimited live guide, diagnosis and price data

privacy.title: Privacy & Legal
privacy.analyticsDesc: Helps us improve the app (no personal data)

delete.confirmMessage: Your account and all data (vehicles, diagnoses, logs) will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

problem.title: Something's wrong
problem.desc: Describe or show it, I'll diagnose

maintenance.title: Doing maintenance
maintenance.desc: Do it yourself with a step-by-step guide

priceGuide.title: Price Guide
priceGuide.desc: What do jobs cost at a mechanic for this car?

home.tasksEmpty: Add maintenance entries and your to-dos will appear here.
home.connectError: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and retry.
home.savingsTeaser: Keep up with upkeep to extend your car's life and avoid surprise costs.
home.savings: You've saved about ₺{{amount}} doing {{count}} maintenance jobs yourself.

maintenance.title: Service
maintenance.subtitle: Pick a task for your car, then verify the right spot with the camera.

live.intro: Tap Start, point the camera at the part and ask out loud — I'll tell you what it most likely is.
live.cameraHint: Camera permission needed — I'll ask when you tap Start.
live.audioNotReady: Audio module not wired in this build (dev-build required). Video works, audio is silent.

error.premium: You've used your free live minutes this month — go unlimited with Premium.

premium.title: Usta Premium
premium.tagline: Your car's master, unlimited in your pocket.
premium.comingSoon: Purchases go live at launch. Preview for now.
premium.disclaimer: Cancel anytime. Prices confirmed at the store.

prices.title: Price Guide
prices.subtitle: Estimated mechanic costs for common jobs on this car. Tap a job to see how it's done.
prices.disclaimer: Estimated range; varies by car, city and severity. Get a quote for an exact price.

guide.verifyCta: Found the right spot? Point the camera, I'll check.

done.title: Nice work! 🔧
done.desc: {{task}} is done and saved to your history.

diagnosis.title: What's wrong?
diagnosis.intro: Welcome! Describe the noise — when does it happen, what does it sound like? I'll tell you what it most likely is.

show.title: Show
show.desc: Point the camera at the part

delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{make}} {{model}}? This cannot be undone.

empty.title: No vehicle added yet
empty.desc: Tell us about your car first for tailored guidance.

form.title: Add Vehicle
form.specAutoHint: Specs are auto-filled for known TR vehicles.
form.validation: Please enter make, model, year (1950–2100) and fuel type.

auth.toLogin: Already have an account? Log in
auth.loggedOutPrompt: Log in to access your garage.

sound.title: Sound Diagnosis
sound.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. A ticking from the front on a cold start
sound.recordedHint: Engine sound is not recorded — only your description is sent.

error.offline: You are offline — check your connection and try again
error.aiUnavailable: The AI service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
error.busy: The service is busy right now. Please try again shortly.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.emptyHint: Add maintenance entries and km-based reminders will appear here.

logs.title: Past Entries
logs.emptyHint: Finish a maintenance guide or add an entry manually below.

diagnoses.title: Diagnosis History
diagnoses.emptyHint: Camera verifications and sound diagnoses will be listed here.

error.offline: You are offline — check your connection and try again

camera.stepTitle: Find the dipstick and check the level
camera.safetyStrip: Warning: The engine may be hot. Park on firm ground; if jacked up, support it with axle stands.
camera.permissionRequest: We need camera access to verify you are looking at the right part.
camera.permissionDenied: Camera permission denied. Grant access in settings to verify the correct part.
camera.offline: You are offline — waiting for connection
camera.hint: Center the part in the frame and tap Check

result.correct: You are in the right place

error.offline: You are offline — check your connection and try again
error.aiUnavailable: The AI service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
error.busy: The service is busy right now. Please try again shortly.

dashboard.title: Warning Light
dashboard.safetyStrip: Don't shoot while driving. Stop somewhere safe and capture the cluster with the ignition on.
dashboard.noLights: I couldn't clearly make out a warning light. Try a brighter, sharper photo.

entry.title: What does this warning light mean?
entry.desc: Snap a photo of the light on your cluster and I'll explain

dtc.title: Fault Code
dtc.intro: Enter the fault code you read from an OBD-II scanner; I'll explain what it likely means for this vehicle.
dtc.notePlaceholder: Add symptoms if any: misfire, light on…
dtc.disclaimer: The same code can mean different things on different cars. This is preliminary info — see a mechanic for a definitive diagnosis.

error.empty: Enter a valid fault code (e.g. P0300)

entry.title: What does this fault code mean?
entry.desc: Type a code like P0300 and I'll explain

symptom.title: Describe the Problem
symptom.intro: Describe the issue with your car in your own words; I'll tell you what it's likely about and what to do.
symptom.placeholder: e.g. Engine shakes at idle, smooths out when I rev.
symptom.disclaimer: This is a preliminary assessment — see a mechanic for a definitive diagnosis.

error.empty: Please describe the problem in a few words

entry.title: Describe a problem
entry.desc: Tell me in text and I'll diagnose it

fuel.title: Fuel Tracking
fuel.consumptionHint: Consumption needs at least 2 full-tank fill-ups.
fuel.fullTankDesc: Consumption is computed from full fill-ups

error.invalid: Odometer and liters must be valid

report.title: 🔧 Usta Report
report.cta: A master mechanic in your pocket — try Usta: {{link}}

share.invite: 🔧 Try Usta — do car maintenance yourself step by step, verify with AI, save money: {{link}}
share.achievement: 🔧 Did the {{task}} job myself, saved ~₺{{savings}} — with Usta!

brief.sheetHint: Show this summary to your mechanic or share it.
brief.title: 🔧 USTA PRE-ASSESSMENT
brief.disclaimer: ⚠️ This is an AI PRE-assessment, not a definitive diagnosis. Please do your own check.

mechanics.title: Find a Mechanic
mechanics.empty: Mechanics in your area will be listed here soon.
mechanics.disclaimer: Mechanics are independent; Usta only refers and isn't responsible for the service.

resolution.title: How did it turn out?
resolution.costPrompt: What did you pay the mechanic? (optional — helps others)

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.intro: You're in control of your data. With consent off, no analytics are sent. Change it anytime below, or delete all your data.

analytics.title: Usage analytics
analytics.desc: Anonymous screen/event data to improve the app. When off, no analytics are sent.

data.title: Anonymous contribution
data.desc: Your diagnoses feed aggregate fault stats without your identity (e.g. 'this fault is common on that model').

stats.title: Community stats
stats.empty: Not enough anonymous data yet — it builds up as you use the app.

delete.title: Delete your data
delete.desc: Permanently deletes your account and all vehicle/maintenance/diagnosis data. Cannot be undone.
delete.confirmMsg: Your account and all your data will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
